summary:
The incidence of dual canals in mandibular incisors is very rare, typically reported below 3%. This conclusion stems from their usual single root anatomy and lack of documented cases compared to other dentition regions or teeth types. 

Note: Only include information directly derived from Agent1’s reasoning; avoid adding external knowledge not present in it.
